overview: Rakshak Web is a production-grade cloud security dashboard for remotely controlling an ESP32-based security system from anywhere in the world. Features dual-zone arm/disarm controls, real-time device status, alarm overlays, and full event logging — all in a premium dark military-grade interface.
features: Dual-zone arm/disarm controls with shield icons and pulsing glow animations
Real-time device status polling with online/offline detection
Full-screen alarm overlay for intrusion and SOS events with audio alert
Complete event log with filter tabs (Alarms, Arm Events, Power, System)
Device pairing flow with unique Device ID (RKSH-XXXX format)
Multi-device management and device switching from dashboard header
Settings: account, notifications per-event toggles, user sharing, zone labels
Internet Identity authentication with persistent session
PWA-ready with installable manifest and service worker
Responsive mobile-first layout optimized for 375px to 1440px
